message:
Consolidate YAML escaping utilities and fix skill generation bugs

- Extract shared escapeYamlValue and escapeYamlArrayItem to yaml.ts
- Fix tag escaping in skills.ts to properly escape backslashes and newlines
- Fix bundle frontmatter to only list prompts that actually exist
- Remove duplicate escapeYamlValue from bundles.ts
- Add backslash to list of characters that trigger quoting

Previously, tag escaping only replaced double quotes, leaving backslashes
and newlines unescaped. The bundle frontmatter listed all promptIds from
the bundle definition even if some prompts didn't exist in the registry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 /**
  * Generate SKILL.md content for a single prompt
@@ -49,7 +19,7 @@ export function generateSkillMd(prompt: Prompt): string {

@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+/**
+ * YAML escaping utilities for skill/bundle generation
+ */
+
+/**
+ * Escape a string for safe use in a YAML double-quoted array element.
+ * Handles backslashes, double quotes, and newlines.
+ */
+export function escapeYamlArrayItem(value: string): string {
+  return value
+    .replace(/\\/g, "\\\\")
+    .replace(/"/g, '\\"')
+    .replace(/\n/g, "\\n");
+}
+
+/**
+ * Escape a string for safe YAML scalar value.
+ * Quotes strings containing special YAML characters.
+ */
+export function escapeYamlValue(value: string): string {
+  // Check if value needs quoting (contains special chars, newlines, or starts/contains special chars)
+  if (
+    value.includes(":") ||
+    value.includes("#") ||
+    value.includes("\n") ||
+    value.includes('"') ||
+    value.includes("'") ||
+    value.includes("[") ||
+    value.includes("]") ||
+    value.includes("{") ||
+    value.includes("}") ||
+    value.includes(">") ||
+    value.includes("|") ||
+    value.includes("\\") ||
+    value.startsWith(" ") ||
+    value.endsWith(" ") ||
+    value.startsWith("@") ||
+    value.startsWith("!") ||
+    value.startsWith("&") ||
+    value.startsWith("*")
+  ) {
+    // Use double quotes with escaped internal characters
+    return `"${escapeYamlArrayItem(value)}"`;
+  }
+  return value;
+}
